meta.question: Find any L3 APT requirments that currently lack a satisify or verify link.
meta.finalAnswer:
There are **26 L3 APT Requirements** that currently lack a satisfy or verify link:

1. APS Maintainability
2. APS Metric Standardization
3. Accommodate LOWFS
4. CCD Full Read Out Rate
5. CCD ROI Read Out Rate
6. Complete loss of power
7. Coolant Pressure
8. Coolant Temperatures
9. FOV
10. Glycol used at Nasmyth
11. High signal exposures
12. Image quality
13. Low signal exposures
14. Mass Allocation
15. Max. Pressure Drop of Coolant
16. Nighttime power to air inside the Enclosure
17. Nighttime power to water/glycol inside the Enclosure
18. OFF to Standby in 24 hours
19. Peak Power inside the Enclosure
20. Plate scale
21. Plate scale distortion (central field)
22. Plate scale distortion (full field)
23. Publish camera frames
24. Standby to Operating in 1 min
25. Survival Conditions
26. Withstand multiple E-Stops

These requirements have dependencies to parent requirements in the model, but no satisfy (from design elements) or verify (from test cases/analyses) relationships have been established yet.

events.output: I'll help you find L3 APT requirements that lack satisfy or verify links. Let me start by exploring the model to find these elements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("L3 APT"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APT"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found the L3 APT Requirements package. Now need to explore its properties to find the actual requirements inside and check for satisfy/verify links.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("L3 APT Requirements"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("L3 APT Requirements"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found the L3 APT Requirements package with 64 owned elements. Now need to find the actual requirements and check for satisfy/verify links.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?req rdf:type ?type .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?req .
  ?req rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), "requirement"))
  OPTIONAL { ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?req .
  ?req rdf:type ?type .
}
GROUP BY ?type
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?dep ?client ?supplier ?depType WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?dep .
  ?dep rdf:type vocab:dependency .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?client .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier .
  ?dep rdf:type ?depType .
}
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?client ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?dep .
  ?dep rdf:type vocab:dependency .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?client .
  OPTIONAL { ?client vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?dep .
  ?dep rdf:type vocab:dependency .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  OPTIONAL { ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?client WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?dep .
  ?dep rdf:type vocab:dependency .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?client .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?req rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?client ?name (COUNT(?dep) as ?depCount) WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?dep .
  ?dep rdf:type vocab:dependency .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?client .
  OPTIONAL { ?client vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
}
GROUP BY ?client ?name
ORDER BY ?name
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?depType (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?dep .
  ?dep rdf:type ?depType .
}
GROUP BY ?depType
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Package_ownedType ?req .
  ?req rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?depType (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?dep .
  ?dep rdf:type ?depType .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?depType)), "satisfy") || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?depType)), "verify"))
}
GROUP BY ?depType

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), "satisfy") || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), "verify"))
}
GROUP BY ?type
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "L3%20APT%20Requirements" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?dep .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_client ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  OPTIONAL { ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name }
}
LIMIT 100

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?sat ?client ?supplier WHERE {
  ?sat rdf:type vocab:satisfy .
  ?sat vocab:Dependency_client ?client .
  ?sat vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier .
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?ver ?client ?supplier WHERE {
  ?ver rdf:type vocab:verify .
  ?ver vocab:Dependency_client ?client .
  ?ver vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier .
}
LIMIT 20
